channel.title: 7.1-Rc1 on DAMON Project Website
channel.description: Recent content in 7.1-Rc1 on DAMON Project Website

item.title: DAMON Release News Letter (v7.0-rc1..v7.1-rc1)
item.description: This is also posted to the mailing list. Hello community, This news letter covers DAMON features that landed on the mainline, and misc events that were interesting to me that happened in v7.0-rc1..v7.1-rc1 time period (2026-02-22..2026-04.26). The news letter covering the previous release cycle (v6.19-rc1..v7.0-rc1) is also available [1]. Changes Landed On v7.0 All changes that were landed on v7.0-rc1 have successfully landed on v7.0. Read the news letter for v7.
